author: notapplica
name: NTK Eval + Overtone Init
blurb: Train@1024 with overtone embedding init and phase-transition residual mixing, eval@2048 with NTK-aware dynamic RoPE frequency scaling. AdamW weight decay 0.01, warmdown 2500 steps, tied embedding LR 0.10. Three seed runs (1337, 42, 7) show p=0.0012 for 0.0194-nat improvement over baseline.
